purpose: Define what activation authority is and when work may lawfully become enactment
owns: activation jurisdiction; request classes; approval and denial; relation to scheduler allocator entry and continuation
must_not_absorb: scheduler policy; executor lifecycle mechanics; role theater
inputs: schedule candidates|operator entry|continuation bundles|capability posture|allocator constraints

purpose: Define how executors are claimed entered suspended resumed released and retired
owns: executor claim; readiness; lifecycle states; transitions; release and retirement; lifecycle receipts
must_not_absorb: activation jurisdiction; future-work scheduling; continuation ontology
inputs: activation decisions|executor bindings|handoff capsules|takeover validation|execution returns
outputs: lifecycle state transitions|entry receipts|suspension receipts|release receipts|retirement receipts
